text.title: Edge and CDN Strategy Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-platform
step.action: Pick edge platform per the decision tree. Document choice.

step.name: design-cache-keys
step.action: Per route, list vary headers + cache TTL. Confirm auth boundary in cache key.
step.note: Gate: If route is personalised AND cache_ttl > 0, STOP — review auth boundary.

step.name: enable-shielding
step.action: Enable origin shielding. Pick shield region near origin. Multi-shield for high-volume.

step.name: configure-auth-handoff
step.action: Implement single-place auth + signed-identity handoff. Remove duplicate auth.

step.name: configure-bypass-and-budget
step.action: Add fallback DNS. Set per-request budget + alert. Build hit-ratio dashboard.
